title: Crispy Spicy Turkish Chicken Skewers
description: Juicy chicken skewers coated in a spicy yogurtcaper glaze, grilled to crisp perfection, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cut the chicken into 1½‑inch cubes and place in a bowl.
Whisk together yogurt, olive oil, minced garlic, cumin, paprika, red pepper flakes, capers, lemon juice, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Add the yogurt mixture to the chicken, coat well, and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes (or up to 2 hours).
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium‑high heat.
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Grill the skewers 3–4 minutes per side, until the chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (75°C) and the edges are crisp.
Transfer skewers to a plate, garnish with chopped parsley, and serve immediately with a side of yogurt‑caper dipping sauce if desired.
